quality.description_clarity: The description is clear and accurately details the mechanical effect, cost, and target limitation.
quality.completeness: All necessary mechanical components (cost, effect, limiting factor) are present.

mechanics.core_mechanic: Mitigation of saving throws for chosen allies.
mechanics.cost_assessment: Costs 1 sorcery point, which is standard for minor metamagic adjustments.
mechanics.scaling_potential: The number of creatures protected scales with Charisma modifier, which is appropriate for a Sorcerer class feature.
mechanics.synergy: Strong synergy with area-of-effect (AoE) spells that require enemies to make saving throws, effectively guaranteeing success for targeted allies.

potential_issues: None apparent; this is a standard, well-established Sorcerer Metamagic feature (often called 'Subtle Spell' or similar variations depending on the edition/source, but mechanically resembles protecting allies).
